code:
sequenceDiagram participant VThread_A as "Thread Executora da Tarefa
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)" participant TaskExecutorService as "TaskExecutorService" participant EventPublisher as "EventPublisher" participant SharedExecutor as "Executor Partilhado
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)" VThread_A ->>+ TaskExecutorService: executeSynchronousBlock(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) loop "Ciclo de Execução Síncrona" Note over TaskExecutorService: Executa a lógica do Nó N... TaskExecutorService ->> TaskExecutorService: Acumula Evento (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) end Note right of TaskExecutorService: O ciclo termina ao encontrar um ponto de commit. TaskExecutorService ->>+ EventPublisher: publishEvents(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Note right of EventPublisher: A thread principal NÃO espera. par "Notificação Assíncrona dos Listeners com Lote de Eventos" EventPublisher ->> SharedExecutor: submit(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)) and EventPublisher ->> SharedExecutor: submit(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)) end EventPublisher -->>- TaskExecutorService: Retorna Imediatamente TaskExecutorService -->>- VThread_A: Retorna VThread_A ->> VThread_A: Continua para o próximo passo (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Note over SharedExecutor: Os listeners agora podem otimizar o seu trabalho
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream).

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个时序图，展示IoT工业遥测流中任务执行器的工作流程。核心是一个叫VThread_A的线程，它会调用TaskExecutorService来执行同步代码块，处理IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController的逻辑。
明白了，VThread_A是发起方。那TaskExecutorService内部的具体逻辑怎么呈现？我看到有个循环结构，还有事件累积的逻辑。
对，TaskExecutorService内部要有个循环，标注为"Ciclo de Execução Síncrona"，循环里执行Nó N的逻辑，并且会累积来自IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode的事件。循环结束后有个备注说明终止条件。
好的，我已经画出了VThread_A到TaskExecutorService的调用，以及内部的同步执行循环。现在循环结束后，TaskExecutorService需要发布事件对吧？我看到要调用EventPublisher。
没错，调用publishEvents，参数是IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic。这里有个关键点：主线程不等待，要立即返回。需要在EventPublisher右侧加一个备注说明这一点。
收到。那EventPublisher之后呢？我看到有个并行块par，涉及SharedExecutor。这个并行结构是做什么的？
这是异步通知机制。EventPublisher会并行地向SharedExecutor提交两个任务，都是处理IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode的事件。这个并行块标注为"Notificação Assíncrona dos Listeners com Lote de Eventos"，表示用事件批次异步通知监听器。
已添加并行块，两个submit调用都指向SharedExecutor。那并行块结束后，EventPublisher需要返回给TaskExecutorService吗？
是的，用虚线箭头表示立即返回，标注"Retorna Imediatamente"。然后TaskExecutorService也要返回给VThread_A。最后VThread_A继续执行下一步，处理IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic。
流程都画好了。最后SharedExecutor那里需要加备注吗？我看到代码里有个关于监听器优化的说明。

对，在SharedExecutor上方加一个备注，说明监听器现在可以优化它们的工作，关联到IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。另外检查一下各参与者的标签：VThread_A应该是"Thread Executora da Tarefa (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)"，SharedExecutor是"Executor Partilhado (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)"。
所有标签和备注都已核对完成。整个流程从VThread_A发起同步执行，经过事件累积、异步发布、并行提交，最终主线程立即返回继续执行，完整呈现了IoT工业遥测流的任务执行机制。
